---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new solution, template, or example
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

### What problem does this solve?
<!-- The recurring failure mode or pain point. One paragraph. -->

### Proposed solution
<!-- New template, new example, or specific SKILL.md addition. Be concrete. -->

### Example input and expected output
<!-- A trigger phrase or input the skill should handle, and what it should produce. -->

### Which existing solution is most similar?
<!-- One of the 8, or "none — this is genuinely new". -->

### Are you willing to implement this?
<!-- yes / no -->
